stemHtml: Which statement regarding the Earth's magnetism is correct?

options.a: An isogonal is a line which connects points with the same magnetic variation; the aclinic connects points with the same magnetic field strength.
options.b: An isogonal is a line which connects points with the same magnetic variation; the agonic line is the line of zero magnetic dip.
options.c: An isogonal is a line which connects points of equal dip; the aclinic is the line of zero magnetic dip.
options.d: An isogonal is a line which connects points with the same magnetic variation; the aclinic is the line of zero magnetic dip.
